title: RTX 5090 Struggles with Local LLMs Compared to Apple Silicon
summary: RTX 5090 underperforms Apple Silicon in running local LLMs, a disappointing outcome for a high-end gaming PC build.

title: Microsoft Edge Updates Copilot AI on Desktop and Mobile

title: Adcore Reports 22% Revenue Increase in Q1 2026

title: AI Enhances Job Scams, Making Them More Believable
